ACU3_x64_x06_v2

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 2C
Func Name: Airbag

[

    "soft": "0105",

    "name": "Lecture état du système",

      "Allumeurs partie basse déjà mis à feu": {
        "firstbyte": 16,

        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true,

        "ref": true,

      },

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true,

      },
      "Calculateur à changer": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration clé d inhibition": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration Crash output": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration des Entrées-Sorties": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration des lignes de mise à feu partie basse": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration des lignes de mise à feu partie haute": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration Isofix": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration ligne ABfront CDC": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration ligne ABfront PSG": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 23,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration ligne ABlat rideau PSG x64": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "bitoffset": 4,

      },

      },

        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 24,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration satellite CDC": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration satellite PSG": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Configuration type d inhibition": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Crash non confirmé sur choc latéral": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Etat de l inhibition de l airbag passager": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Etat instantané du témoin d alerte": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Etat instantané du témoin d inhibition": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Ligne ABfront CDC mise à feu": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Ligne ABfront PSG mise à feu": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Ligne ABlat rideau CDC mise à feu x64": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Ligne ABlat rideau PSGmise à feu x64": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Ligne ABlat thorax PSG mise à feu": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,

      },

        "firstbyte": 16,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 16,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 22,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Nombre de crash enregistrés": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Nombre de défauts fugitifs enregistrés en Ram": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Nombre de défauts présents enregistrés en Ram": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Safing fermé en roulage": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Seuils d alerte d impédance modifié par messagerie": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Témoin d alerte commandé suite à un crash": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "2180",

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 24,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "ref": true,

        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true,

      },

        "bitoffset": 6,

        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Satellite PSG disponible": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true,

      },

        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Version du logiciel MCU Safing": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Version HW - nb max de voies Asics": {
        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },

        "ref": true,

        "ref": true,

      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },

        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"

        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Panne présente_5": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 26,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true,

    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "3BD5FF",
    "name": "Retour configuration de toutes les entrées-sorties",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3BD1FFFF",
    "name": "Retour configuration de toutes les lignes de mise ",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "81",
    "name": "StartCommunication",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "StartDiagnosticsession",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "mode diagnostic sélectionné": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "82",
    "name": "StopCommunication",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "3E",
    "name": "TesterPresent",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3BD0",
    "name": "Verrouillage - Déverrouillage des lignes de mise à",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Sélection Verrouillage ou déverrouillage": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  }
]
